ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the electronic component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the datasheet for the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the component */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the component's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" TEXT /* Conversion factor to other common units */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the unit's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_desc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter description */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter this description belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the timing parameter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the parameter description */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the description is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_desc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter this annotation belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the annotation is private */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this report is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last update of the report */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the report is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the parameter */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
